metadata.name: Oak
metadata.title: Oak Laser Cleaning Settings
metadata.description: Detailed machine settings, parameter relationships, diagnostic procedures, and troubleshooting guides for optimizing oak laser cleaning operations.

author.name: Alessandro Moretti
author.title: Ph.D.
credentials: Assisted in EU Horizon 2020 laser additive projects, 2016-2019
author.imageAlt: Alessandro Moretti, Ph.D., Materials Engineer at Politecnico di Milano's Materials Dept., in research lab

powerRange.description: Optimal average power for Oak surface cleaning without charring

wavelength.description: Near-IR wavelength for optimal absorption in Oak cellulose and lignin

spotSize.description: Beam spot diameter for precise cleaning resolution

repetitionRate.description: Optimal repetition rate for efficient cleaning with thermal management

energyDensity.description: Fluence threshold for effective contaminant removal without wood damage

pulseWidth.description: Nanosecond pulse duration for controlled ablation of contaminants

scanSpeed.description: Optimal scanning speed for uniform cleaning coverage

passCount.description: Recommended number of passes for complete surface cleaning

overlapRatio.description: Optimal beam overlap for uniform cleaning pattern

dwellTime.description: Optimal dwell time per cleaning spot
